description: Lock Typewritten Office Workflows to commercial typewriters and paper document workflows, not catalogs or installment credit.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to first commercial typewriter availability.
The typewriter remains the required device for the scoped office workflows.
Typed office workflows cannot exist without typewriters.
Paper remains the document substrate for typed correspondence, forms, files, and carbon copies.
Paper enables the document workflow without being the typewriting device itself.
Industrial parts catalogs should not be restored unless the node is rescoped to catalog production.
Installment credit should not be restored unless the node is rescoped to typewriter sales finance.
